{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged cloud-aspect madra
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]]'s mattress is packed with [[Forged cloud-aspect madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
